sentences.english: I complain about the weather all the time.
It's either too hot or too cold — I can never be happy.
sentences.korean: 너무 덥거나 너무 춥고 — 만족할 수가 없어요.

sentences.english: I try not to complain too much.
It doesn't solve anything and it just makes you feel worse.
sentences.korean: 아무것도 해결하지 못하고 기분만 더 나빠지거든요.

sentences.english: I complain about my commute every single day, honestly.
It takes me two hours to get to work and two hours back.

quiz.question: What is the main topic of this passage?
